content: Obsidian ecosystem has multiple Whisper-based transcription plugins: AI Audio Transcription and Summary (record locally, transcribe with Whisper or Gemini, summarize with LLM), Transcription plugin (Whisper ASR, any device), Advanced Audio Recorder (record+play+transcribe in Obsidian), AI Transcriber (OpenAI API). All leverage Whisper; some support local/offline for privacy. Shows the Obsidian community already does ad hoc what unibrain aims to do natively.
